title: SvelteKit
excerpt: description: Create a SvelteKit application and deploy it to Cloudflare Workers with Workers Assets. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. In this guide, you will create a new [SvelteKit ↗](https://svelte.dev/docs/kit/introduction) application and deploy to Cloudflare Workers. Run `wrangler deploy` in a project without a Wrangler configuration file and Wrangler will automatically detect SvelteKit, generate the necessary configuration, and deploy your project.
